title: Schematic Sticks
description: A mod to replace sticks in Schematic Mods
body:
A mod for the Litematica or Forgematica as a placeholder for the item to use Schematics instead of a stick.

 

The mod includes 9 sticks.
![Stick](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7386010e836e795ab93f105d5aa2de99e92b3007.png)

Go to https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/litematica or https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/forgematica to use the mod for its purpose otherwise just a stick mod.
